summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShowMeLive new features: Creator Analytics Dashboard and WebRTC Control Panel. All features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads for guests with events carousel
Creator Dashboard shows Analytics button (purple bg-purple-600)
Creator Dashboard shows Payouts button
Creator Dashboard shows Create Event button
Creator Analytics page at /creator/analytics loads with all charts
Analytics: Summary cards (Total Revenue, Your Earnings 80%, Tickets Sold, Avg Ticket Price)
Analytics: Revenue Trend bar chart with monthly data
Analytics: Category Breakdown chart with percentage bars
Analytics: Top Performing Events table with columns (Event, Date, Status, Tickets, Revenue)
Control Panel shows professional UI with camera grid (5 cameras for premium)
Control Panel shows audio controls (Mic Volume with visualization bars)
Control Panel shows Speaker volume slider
Control Panel shows Treble and Bass controls
Control Panel shows Video Transition options (Cut, Fade, Crossfade)
Control Panel shows Camera Preview sidebar on right
Control Panel shows Start Stream button (green)
Control Panel shows PRO badge for premium events
Admin panel login works at /admin/login with admin@showmelive.com / admin123
Admin dashboard shows all tabs: Overview, Users, Events, Tickets, Live, Bank
API: GET /api/events - public events list (200)
API: GET /api/creator/analytics - returns summary, revenue_trend, category_breakdown, top_events (200)
API: GET /api/creator/earnings - returns total_revenue, creator_earnings, pending_payout (200)
API: GET /api/events/creator/my-events - returns creator's events (200)
API: GET /api/creator/onboarding-status - returns step progress (200)
API: GET /api/streaming/devices/{event_id} - returns streaming devices (200)
API: POST /api/admin/login - admin authentication (200)
API: GET /api/admin/dashboard - admin statistics (200)
API: GET /api/creator/bank-status - returns bank linking status (200)
API: GET /api/creator/payouts - returns payout history (200)
seed_data_creation: Created test creator user with session, test event with premium streaming package, and test tickets for analytics data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Creator Analytics Dashboard with revenue trends, category breakdown, and top events table - all charts display correctly with real data. 2) WebRTC Control Panel with professional multi-camera interface - includes camera switching (5 cameras for premium), audio controls (mic volume with visualization, speaker, treble, bass), video transitions (cut/fade/crossfade), and camera preview sidebar. Note: WebRTC streaming is UI only - no actual WebRTC implementation (MOCKED). Bank linking uses manual form (MOCKED Plaid).

mocked_apis.webrtc_streaming: UI only, no actual WebRTC implementation - buttons and controls work but don't connect to real streaming
mocked_apis.plaid_bank_linking: Uses manual form instead of Plaid Link due to missing API keys
